name: Snow Crystal
description: Delicate ice crystal formations with frozen sparkle

prompts.SessionStart: icy crystalline bell ascending with bright frozen harmonic tone, ice bell chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: crystalline bell descending with smooth frozen icy decay, ice bell tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single icy crystalline bell strike with bright frozen ring, ice bell chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct ice bell tick with crisp frozen crystalline click, ice tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short ice bell chirp confirming with bright crystalline ping, ice chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two icy bell tones with questioning rising crystalline interval, ice chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady icy bell pulse with clear rhythmic crystalline shimmer, ice tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: icy bell tone splitting into two diverging crystalline voices, ice chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear icy bell ping returning with distinct frozen crystalline ring, ice tone, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright icy crystalline bell burst with energetic frozen attack, ice chime, minimal notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
